description: Style Note The luxe comfort and rugged styling of gliders' shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style.  Product DetailsRound toed blue and red floaters, has velcro closures on the forefoot, midfoot and backfoot Synthetic upper, forefoot and midfoot velcro closures are connected by a side strap which loops around to connect with the velcro strap at the backfoot Light weight curved footbed with grooves TPU outsole and comes with a shoe bag Material and CareSynthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth when required
